name: Genealogy Research
description_en: A genealogy research assistant using the Genealogical Proof Standard: analyzes historical documents and handwritten records in any script, manages an Obsidian knowledge base, builds family trees and GEDCOM, and plans the next steps for systematic ancestor discovery.
description_zh: 采用「家谱证明标准」(GPS)的家谱研究助手:解析任意文字的历史文献与手写记录,管理 Obsidian 知识库,构建家谱与 GEDCOM,并为系统性的祖先溯源规划下一步。
long_en: Brings a disciplined research methodology to ancestor discovery, tracking evidence and progress across countries and time periods rather than ad-hoc note-keeping.
long_zh: 为祖先溯源引入规范的研究方法,跨国家与年代地追踪证据与进度,而非临时记录。
sec_note_en: Analyzes personal and historical documents you provide and maintains a local Obsidian vault; keep living-relatives' data private.
sec_note_zh: 会解析你提供的个人与历史文献,并维护本地 Obsidian 库;请妥善保护在世亲属的隐私数据。
